---
title: "Oceanography"
subtitle: "Physical and chemical properties of the world's oceans and their geographic significance."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Oceanography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores the physical, chemical, and biological dynamics of the world's oceans — covering ocean floor topography, water masses, currents, tides, and the marine environment.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Relief of Oceans.**
* **Composition: Temperature, Density and Salinity.**
* **Circulation: Warm and Cold Currents, Waves, Tides.**
* **Sea Level Changes.**
* **Hazards: Tsunami and Cyclone.**

---

{{< include oceanography/01-origin-of-ocean-basins.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/02-bottom-relief-of-indian-atlantic-and-pacific-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/03-ocean-deposits.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/04-coral-reefs-coral-bleaching.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/05-temperature-and-salinity-of-the-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/06-density-of-seawater.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/07-ocean-currents.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/08-sea-level-changes.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/09-bottom-topography-of-the-atlantic-indian-and-pacific-oceans.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/10-course-content.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/11-heat-and-salt-budgets.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/12-law-of-the-sea-and-marine-pollution.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/13-marine-resources.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/14-ocean-climate-interaction.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/15-ocean-floor-topography.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/16-temperature-salinity.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/17-waves-currents-and-tides.md >}}

{{< include oceanography/18-waves-tides.md >}}
